title: F5 Networks (FFIV) Launches Distributed Cloud AIP Solution
text: F5 Networks (FFIV) releases newest addition to F5 Distributed Cloud Services portfolio, F5 Distributed Cloud App Infrastructure Protection, to protect applications and cloud-native infrastructures.

title: F5 Expands SaaS-Based Security Portfolio with Launch of F5 Distributed Cloud App Infrastructure Protection
text: SEATTLE--( BUSINESS WIRE )--F5 (NASDAQ: FFIV) today announced the launch of F5 Distributed Cloud App Infrastructure Protection (AIP), a cloud workload protection solution that expands application observability and protection to cloud-native infrastructures. Powered by technology acquired with Threat Stack, AIP is the newest addition to the F5 Distributed Cloud Services portfolio of cloud-native SaaS-based application security and delivery services.

title: F5 Appoints Kara Sprague as Chief Product Officer
text: SEATTLE--( BUSINESS WIRE )--F5 (NASDAQ: FFIV) today announced the appointment of Kara Sprague to the newly created role of Chief Product Officer. In this role, Sprague will oversee F5's entire portfolio of multi-cloud application security and delivery solutions, with a focus on expanding SaaS offerings on the F5 Distributed Cloud Platform and enabling organizations to streamline application security and delivery operations across their complex application environments.

title: F5, Inc.: Earnings Beat With Huge Hybrid Cloud Tailwinds
text: F5 is a leading provider of Application Delivery Controllers [ADCs] which help to increase the performance and security of IT systems. The company reported solid financials for Q4 FY22, beating both revenue and earnings estimates, despite longer sales cycles.

title: F5 to Participate in Barclays Global Technology, Media & Telecommunications Conference
text: SEATTLE--( BUSINESS WIRE )--F5, Inc. (NASDAQ: FFIV) today announced that it will participate in the Barclays Global Technology, Media & Telecommunications Conference. F5's fireside chat presentation will be webcast live beginning at 12:50 p.m. ET on Wednesday, December 7, 2022. Interested attendees can access the live webcast via the Investor Relations section of f5.com or via this link. An archived version of the webcast will be available on F5's Investor Relations page.

title: Strength Seen in F5 (FFIV): Can Its 3.2% Jump Turn into More Strength?
text: F5 (FFIV) saw its shares surge in the last session with trading volume being higher than average. The latest trend in earnings estimate revisions may not translate into further price increase in the near term.
